title: Fallback Artifact
description: Governed fallback artifact emitted when a required artifact cannot be produced. Records why the artifact is absent so the gap is auditable rather than silent.

fallback_id.description: Unique identifier for this fallback record.

fallback_reason.description: Machine-readable reason code for the fallback (e.g. docx_not_generated).

original_run_id.description: Run ID of the run that produced this fallback.

created_at.description: RFC3339 timestamp when this fallback was recorded.

message.description: Human-readable explanation of why this fallback exists.

stub_path.description: Path to the stub artifact that was emitted in place of the real artifact.

severity.description: Severity level of this fallback gap.
